challenge_state: Cloudflare "Verify you are human" challenge visible in live browser UI before any results rendered
cautious_result: A live browser-UI Bing query for the exact case number plus iTutorGroup did not expose complaint, decree, docket, or order results in this bounded pass because the page itself stopped at a Cloudflare verification gate.
paper_use_note: Reviewer-safe negative evidence that the browser-discovery route is currently blocked by an interactive challenge, complementing the earlier Bing RSS noise audit.

challenge_state: Cloudflare "Verify you are human" challenge visible in live browser UI before any results rendered
cautious_result: A second live browser-UI Bing query restricted to the official EDNY domain plus the exact case number also stopped at the same Cloudflare verification gate and exposed no usable court-facing result list in this bounded pass.
paper_use_note: Helps separate two discovery-failure modes already present in the package: Bing RSS can be noisy, while Bing browser UI can be challenge-gated before any legal results are shown.
